title: ✨ AI Website Builder: Create Custom Web Portfolios via Prompts! 🚀
message: Transform your career profile into a beautiful, production-ready interactive website instantly using our new real-time AI generation engine! 🌐
points: ✨ AI Portfolio Builder: Describe your design vision to instantly generate responsive web portfolio layouts with full HTML, CSS, and interactive JavaScript logic.
🗂️ Interactive Vault & Versions: Save, manage, and rename multiple layout variations while seamlessly switching back and forth between historical design branches.
💬 Conversational Iteration Canvas: Chat directly with the generator to request revisions, modify visual sections, and fine-tune aesthetics on the fly.
🛡️ Auto-Healing Code Sanitation: Embedded an offline parsing system that strips syntax errors and injects native single-tap asset downloading anchors automatically.
🔌 Smart Offline Continuity: Added intelligent socket drop monitoring that routes traffic into on-device local models instantly if internet signals disconnect.
🧱 Viewport Boundary Adaptations: Resolved RenderFlex horizontal row clips on generation log timelines and protected layout scales against keyboard openings.

title: ⚡ Speed Booster: Custom Startup Control & Smart Quotas! 🚀
message: We've optimized your workspace architecture to give you absolute control over your app startup speed and daily tool workflows! 🌿
points: ⚡ Instant Launch Mode: Added a 'Show Splash Screen' toggle in Themes. Switch it off to bypass intro animations and dive straight into your documents!
🎁 Daily Ad-Free Quota: Enjoy 3 completely ad-free career tool or resume actions every single calendar day—resetting automatically at midnight.
🧩 Smart Ad-Network Fallbacks: Upgraded error handling layer to gracefully handle network dropouts and ad inventory constraints with zero endless loading hangs.
📱 Responsive Layout Fixes: Resolved RenderFlex horizontal overflow bugs on compact layout panels to ensure pixel-perfect text reading.

title: 🧠 AI Evolution: On-Device & Custom Cloud Access! 🚀
message: We're taking your career growth to the next level by bringing advanced AI power right into your pocket, whether you're online or offline! 🌿
points: 🧠 On-Device AI Models: Run 'Resumate Standard' or 'Resumate High Power' models locally on your device for private, offline AI assistance.
☁️ Custom Cloud API: Added full support for personal Gemini API keys—use your own keys for unlimited, personalized cloud AI power.
⚙️ Redesigned AI Settings: A dedicated, intuitive tab to manage your models, tokens, and API keys effortlessly.
⚡ Lightning-Fast Performance: Optimized AI engine handling for smoother, faster resume auditing and career tool usage.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest AI tools and resume features. 🌿
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new updates anytime with the new icon in your App Bar.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
